---
title: "George William Frederick Howard, 7th Earl of Carlisle"
---

## George William Frederick Howard, 7th Earl of Carlisle

**Dates:** (1802–1864)

### Description

Lord Lieutenant of Ireland

### Letters

- Letter from October 1, 1857
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
